# to stderr, not stdout. v0.1.2 fix landed at <commit-tbd>: daemon now
# captures BOTH streams via execSpawn's io.MultiWriter+errBuf and
# scans the concatenation in postSpawnCodexResumeHandling. Earlier v0.1
# captured stdout only and missed the banner entirely on real CLI runs
# (E5 probe surfaced the gap).
